description: Style Note You can see the smooth blend of style and comfort in this remanika creation. This bright red top can be worn with slim Fit black trousers and flat pumps for an elegant look. Accessorise subtly for a sharp and smart look. Product Details Off white sleeveless top with a draped neckline Material and Care Cotton and lycra Gentle machine wash Use non chlorine bleach only and tumble dry low Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
